title: asclepias alpestris
intro: Asclepias alpestris, also known as alpine milkweed, is a perennial plant native to mountainous regions in the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Asclepias alpestris include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Asclepias alpestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
